title: Preserving morphology while extracting DNA: a non-destructive protocol for slide-mounted specimens
author: Jaume-Schinkel, Santiago
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 6 DNA concentration within each shaking category. A. Interrupted shaking. B. Constant shaking. Significance values obtained from Kruskal-Wallis test with post-hoc Dunn test, Bonferroni corrected. Values: NS = not significant, * = p < 0.05, ** = p < 0.01, *** = p < 0.001, **** = p < 0.0001. The Red dashed line indicates the mean and the blue dashed line indicates the median.
